name: UGC Creator Outreach
description: Scrape brand site, find Meta ads, research brand identity, find Instagram creators via hashtag search, DM them

metaPageId.description: Facebook Page ID of the brand

tools.name: search_instagram_creators
tools.description: Scrape an Instagram hashtag page to discover real creator handles from recent posts

hashtag.description: Hashtag to search e.g. skincare or fitness (without #)

tools.name: instagram_profile
tools.description: Fetch an Instagram profile to get follower count, bio, and verify niche fit

tools.name: send_instagram_dm
tools.description: Send an Instagram DM to a creator
